room.caption: [48] I was listening to music on Newgrounds when writing this.

sprite_index=sBubblun_Idle image_speed=0.05 talker="Bubblun" stringToShow="I don't want to talk to you. Go away!" boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=3100 {instance_destroy()}

sprite_index=sLovelun_Idle image_speed=0.05 talker="Lovelun" stringToShow="He'll calm down soon. Maybe we can talk again later." boxSize=1 image_xscale=-1 if global.gameProgress>=3100 {instance_destroy()}
